title: Hand Drawn Anime Beach Walk Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Hand Drawn Anime Beach Walk Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Relaxed hand-drawn semi-realistic anime beach-walk portrait featuring adult young woman with messy bun, gentle thoughtful smile, and sideward gaze. Subject: adult young woman with messy bun, gentle thoughtful smile, and sideward gaze walks naturally at low tide, wearing and carrying white rolled-sleeve button shirt, high-waisted light-blue cuffed jeans, white sneakers, brown leather travel bag, vintage camera, small necklace and watch, with a gentle thoughtful expression and travel-longing mood. Scene: sunny low-tide beach with wet reflective sand, soft blue sea, green hills, red-roof white houses, rocky headland, scattered stones and footprints creates a sunny coastal travel background with reflective wet sand, calm waves, green hills, red-roof houses, rocky headland, stones, footprints, and light breeze. Composition: Fixed vertical full-body portrait composition: character walking on wet sand, body fully visible, beach horizon and village background softly atmospheric, props readable, and cinematic open travel framing. Signature Elements: adult young woman with messy bun, gentle thoughtful smile, and sideward gaze, white rolled-sleeve button shirt, high-waisted light-blue cuffed jeans, white sneakers, brown leather travel bag, vintage camera, small necklace and watch, sunny low-tide beach with wet reflective sand, soft blue sea, green hills, red-roof white houses, rocky headland, scattered stones and footprints, hand-drawn line art, semi-realistic anime face, low-tide beach walk, warm morning light, travel camera, leather bag, and soft film grain. Style: Relaxed hand-drawn sketch anime aesthetic with semi-realistic character detail, clean variable line weight, painterly shadows, soft atmospheric background, delicate film grain, and warm travel illustration finish. Color Palette: Warm pastels, natural greens, soft blue sea, pale sand reflections, white shirt, light denim blue, leather brown props, and gentle morning sunlight. Lighting: Warm morning light, soft shadows, subtle breeze movement in hair and clothing, reflective highlights on wet sand, and a calm aspirational travel feeling. Camera: Vertical full-body anime portrait camera with slight depth of field, readable character details, and softened scenic background. Materials: Cotton shirt, denim, white sneakers, brown leather travel bag, vintage camera strap, small jewelry, wet sand, sea foam, rocks, and airy linework texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Relaxed hand-drawn semi-realistic anime beach-walk portrait featuring adult illustrator on a coastal walk with loose ponytail and shy reflective expression. Subject: adult illustrator on a coastal walk with loose ponytail and shy reflective expression walks naturally at low tide, wearing and carrying 她穿着一件清爽的白色纽扣衬衫，袖子卷到肘部，松松地扎进高腰浅蓝色卷边牛仔裤里，脚穿白色运动鞋；, with a gentle thoughtful expression and travel-longing mood. Scene: open wet sand with footprints, gentle sea sparkle, distant hills, small houses, warm wind and a few shore stones creates a sunny coastal travel background with reflective wet sand, calm waves, green hills, red-roof houses, rocky headland, stones, footprints, and light breeze. Composition: Fixed vertical full-body portrait composition: character walking on wet sand, body fully visible, beach horizon and village background softly atmospheric, props readable, and cinematic open travel framing. Signature Elements: adult illustrator on a coastal walk with loose ponytail and shy reflective expression, 她穿着一件清爽的白色纽扣衬衫，袖子卷到肘部，松松地扎进高腰浅蓝色卷边牛仔裤里，脚穿白色运动鞋；, open wet sand with footprints, gentle sea sparkle, distant hills, small houses, warm wind and a few shore stones, hand-drawn line art, semi-realistic anime face, low-tide beach walk, warm morning light, travel camera, leather bag, and soft film grain. Style: Relaxed hand-drawn sketch anime aesthetic with semi-realistic character detail, clean variable line weight, painterly shadows, soft atmospheric background, delicate film grain, and warm travel illustration finish. Color Palette: Warm pastels, natural greens, soft blue sea, pale sand reflections, white shirt, light denim blue, leather brown props, and gentle morning sunlight. Lighting: Warm morning light, soft shadows, subtle breeze movement in hair and clothing, reflective highlights on wet sand, and a calm aspirational travel feeling. Camera: Vertical full-body anime portrait camera with slight depth of field, readable character details, and softened scenic background. Materials: Cotton shirt, denim, white sneakers, brown leather travel bag, vintage camera strap, small jewelry, wet sand, sea foam, rocks, and airy linework texture.
